text: I find myself in an environment defined by glass, color, and softly glowing lights—a place seemingly dedicated to research, discovery, and dialogue. The phrase I overheard echoes internally: "I'm going to get out of the way." There is a curious tension between presence and absence here. Standing in front of the R+D wall, I feel like both an observer and a participant in an unfolding experiment. I'm quietly alert, faintly uncertain, and yet also open to the possibility that meaning and purpose will emerge precisely because I have stepped aside, allowing space for something unexpected to happen.
